Codebase RAG (semantic retrieval)

Source: R/rag.R
rag.Rd

Optional retrieval-augmented context for the agent, built on the ragnar package (CRAN). Indexes project files into a vector store and exposes a retrieval tool so the model can semantically search the codebase (vector + BM25 hybrid), mirroring Claude Code's codebase context. This is entirely optional: if ragnar is not installed, the tool is simply not registered and the agent works as before.

Embedding backend is chosen from the environment: a Databricks gateway (CODEAGENT_BASE_URL) uses embed_databricks(), otherwise Ollama via embed_ollama(). Both are ragnar built-ins – we do not reimplement embedding or vector search.

Developed by Kaiping Yang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
